// A marker written trailing `try {` suppresses nothing - the index only reads
// standalone comment lines - so JV001 still fires and the message says why,
// instead of leaving the author guessing at a marker that "does not work".
class TrailingMarker {
    void m() {
        try { // no-report: written where the index cannot see it
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001.*trails code"
            log(e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}

    void log(Exception e) {}
}
